name: AtharlySDK
summary: Atharly mobile attribution & deep linking SDK for iOS — KSA-hosted, PDPL-aligned.
description:
Atharly is a mobile measurement and deep-linking platform built for the
Saudi Arabian market: data residency in KSA, PDPL-aligned by default.

This SDK ships as a closed-source XCFramework. The matching heuristic
and signal-collection pipeline are not source-available; integration is
via the public Swift API surface (`Atharly.shared.initialize(...)`).

  import AtharlySDK
  Atharly.shared.initialize(apiKey: "at_pk_<tenant>_<key>_<secret>",
                            launchOptions: launchOptions)
